features: Natural Deodorant Spray for Him 75 ml
Feel the passion of the game, follow your dreams and become a master
For self-confident, charismatic men inspired by intense emotions and love for play
description: Product Description The new Champions Edition envelops all the passion and glory of the celebrated mug. An intense and invigorating fragrance that evokes the heartfelt dreams and adrenaline pumps moments and leads to the euphoric joy of victory. The aromatic fougère fragrance opens with juicy elements of lemon, blended with cool lavender and crisp purple leaves for an exciting freshness. This unfolds into an elegant masculine heart, with musky and woody cashmere notes as well as pointed elements of green apple and sage. The fragrance ends with warm and earthy notes of vanilla, smoked patchouli and moss that convey a sense of confidence and radiance. Ingredients Alcohol denat, aqua/water/eau, PEG-40 hydrogenated castor oil, perfume/fragrance, ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, triethyl citrate, lime, benzophenone-3, ethylhexyl salicylate, ethylate. LATE, ETH. ylate, ethylate, ethylate, ethylate, ethylate, ethylhexyl glycerer in, butyl methoxydibenzoyl methane, linalool, geraniol, coumarin, alpha-isomethyl ionone, hydroxycitronellal, propyl. Lene Glyco. L, CITRAL, BHT, DISODIUM EDTA, TOCOPHEROL, EXT. D&C Violet No. 2 (CI 60730), FD&C Yellow No. 5 (CI 19140), FD&C BLUE NO. 1 (CI 42090), D&C RED NO. 33 (CI 17200)
